title: cakile edentula var. alacranensis
intro: Cakile edentula var. alacranensis, also known as sea rocket, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is a coastal annual herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which provide relief from skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Cakile edentula var. alacranensis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues.
